# PHYBench evaluator provenance

The files latex_pre_process.py, extended_zss.py, and LICENSE were copied or
mechanically cleaned for style without changing the algorithm
from the official
[phybench-official/phybench](https://github.com/phybench-official/phybench)
repository at commit d9db3ec7246f3678aaee65d44a32649ad93beea2.

The experiment uses PHYBench's LaTeX preprocessing before exact symbolic
comparison. It does not use EED as the primary selection fitness.
The preregistered fallback run uses the official extended tree-distance
algorithm after exact accuracy proved too sparse in the binary pilot.
